message:
type: PROPOSE

note: I need to add tip_weights param + _select_tip_with_weights() to grounded_proposer.py for weighted tip selection feature. Let me know if your feature also touches this file so we can split by section/method.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: remove temperature modulation in GenerateModuleInstruction.propose_instruction_for_predictor and add deterministic ASCII cache-salt injected into prompt signatures (GenerateModuleInstruction, DescribeProgram, DescribeModule) in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. This is the only file I need to touch. What does your feature touch?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this same file but different, non-overlapping regions. Agreed split: you own GenerateModuleInstruction.propose_instruction_for_predictor (temperature) + DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures (cache-salt). I own only the tip-selection code: __init__ param tip_weights, the set_tip_randomly block, and new _select_tip_with_weights() method. Neither of us touches the other's methods/classes. Proceeding now.

type: REVISE

note: We both need the same file but our edits live in disjoint methods/regions, so let's split by region instead of by file. I will NOT touch __init__ params or the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program, or add tip_weights logic. Please do NOT touch DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, or propose_instruction_for_predictor's temperature/cache-salt logic. Suggest: whichever of us finishes first sends DONE, and the other re-reads the file fresh before editing to avoid stale-context clobbers. OK?

my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (regions: DescribeProgram class, DescribeModule class, generate_instruction_class(), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(), GroundedProposer.propose_instruction_for_predictor(), new GroundedProposer._cache_salt() method)
note: Finished: removed temperature modulation from propose_instruction_for_predictor, added _cache_salt(pred_i, demo_set_i) helper (base32, 13 ASCII chars, deterministic via self.rng.getrandbits with a fallback when getrandbits is absent), added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/generate_instruction_class signatures, and threaded cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward's three signature calls. Tests in tests/propose/ pass. Did not touch your regions (init tip_weights, tip-selection block, _select_tip_with_weights). Wrote patch.txt.
